description:
79 tests across 11 spec files covering every user-facing surface:

**New spec files to add:**
- home.spec.js — auth redirect guard
- ledger.spec.js — party select, entries, PDF download, date filters, 400 on missing param
- outstanding.spec.js — columns, test party appears
- production_dashboard.spec.js — 3 sections, date filter, empty range message
- api_endpoints.spec.js — /daily/, /monthly/, /top-parties/ shape + percentage sum + date filter
- import_workflow.spec.js — upload → preview → confirm → history, session guard
- governance.spec.js — approval queue, audit log, backup create
- admin_actions.spec.js — 11 admin list views, download_pdfs + regenerate_pdfs bulk actions, challan/invoice receipt PDFs + 404s

**global-setup.js** — extend to seed challan PW-CH-001, invoice PW-INV-001, payment PW-PAY-001, opening balance, and a ProcessReport for admin action tests.

**global-teardown.js** — extend to clean up all seeded finance records and any MigrationBatch records created during import workflow tests.
title: Write Playwright test suite covering all ERP views, APIs, and admin actions
